title: Tala 10A31380 Kitchen Scissors, Stainless Steel, Grey, 25cm + Tala Set of 3 Wooden Cooking Utensils
features: High quality strong stainless-steel blades that will not rust or stain, Can be used for anything from gift wrapping, trimming herbs, meat or cutting fabric
These scissors are sharp and durable, the blades perfectly align for an accurate cut line
Ergonomic soft grip handles for maximum comfort
Multi-purpose essential items ideal for kitchen, office or crafting use and Dishwasher safe

MULTI-FUNCTIONAL UTENSIL SET: Our set of 3 beech wooden utensils is perfect for all your cooking and baking needs! It includes a wooden spatula and spoon that are ideal for mixing and stirring and a scraper wooden spoon ideal for turning and scraping

FOR NON-STICK SURFACES: These wooden kitchen utensils are extremely gentle on cookware. These wooden spatulas are ideal for use on non-stick surfaces leaving your pans and pots scrape-free. Handwashing is recommended to keep the spoons in pristine condition

BEAUTIFULLY CRAFTED: Trustworthy wooden utensil set that is entirely food safe. These beechwood cooking utensils are naturally made. It will not melt or rust making it better than plastic, metal or silicone kitchen utensils. It’s heat resistant, easy to use and easy to clean

BENEFICIAL FOR THE EARTH: Tala is a proud member of the Forest Stewardship Council. We have a wide range of high-quality woodware items that are produced to the highest quality using FSC’’ wood from naturally responsible sources, including this wooden spoons cooking utensils
